name: Digital Guardian
description: Integrates with Fortra Digital Guardian Analytics and Reporting Cloud (ARC) REST API for exporting events, alerts, and data classification information

actions.name: Export Events
actions.description: Export DLP events from ARC using the Export API with bookmark-based pagination for incremental data retrieval

parameters.name: exportProfile
parameters.description: Name of the export profile to use for data retrieval

parameters.name: bookmark
parameters.description: Bookmark value to resume export from a previous position

actions.name: Acknowledge Export
actions.description: Advance the bookmark value after successfully processing exported data to prevent re-retrieval

actions.name: List Alerts
actions.description: Retrieve DLP alerts from the ARC platform with optional filtering

parameters.name: startTime
parameters.description: Start time for alert query (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: endTime
parameters.description: End time for alert query (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: Filter by alert severity (critical, high, medium, low)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of alerts to return

actions.name: Get Alert Details
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific DLP alert

actions.name: List Policies
actions.description: Retrieve all DLP policies configured in the Digital Guardian platform

actions.name: List Watchlists
actions.description: Retrieve configured watchlists used for data classification and monitoring
